questions.question: Given the evidence, the suspect ___ be released soon.
There is ___ of a breakthrough in the negotiations.
The economy ___ recover faster than analysts predicted.
It is ___ that the two companies will merge.
She ___ well become the youngest CEO in the company's history.
They are ___ to face strong opposition from shareholders.
The virus ___ mutate, making vaccines less effective.
She's ___ not going to accept those terms.
There is a slim ___ they will win the championship.
The report ___ reveal more than we expect.
It is ___ inevitable that AI will transform the workplace.
He ___ not realise how serious the situation is.
The mission ___ succeed if the conditions are right.
There's an even ___ that the bill will be rejected.
She is ___ to be appointed as the new director.
This decision ___ have far-reaching consequences.
He ___ be bluffing – we can't be certain.
